name: Navigation and Section Switching
description: Verify that bottom navigation switches between Dashboard, Settings, Payroll, and Logs sections correctly

planSteps.description: Verify the Dashboard section is visible by default with status card, timer, quick actions, and vacation balance
Click on the Settings navigation button at the bottom of the page
Verify the Settings section is now visible and contains work location, shift thresholds, preferences, financial settings, deductions, and vacation settings cards
Click on the Payroll navigation button at the bottom of the page
Verify the Payroll section is now visible with month navigation bar showing a month title with previous/next buttons, a payroll summary card, a daily history card, and an allowances editor card
Click on the Logs navigation button at the bottom of the page
Verify the Logs section is now visible with monthly overview showing total hours, days worked, vacation left, and a daily history table with headers Date, Shift, In, Out, Total
Click on the Dashboard navigation button at the bottom of the page
Verify the Dashboard section is now visible again with all its cards
